product_page.page_title: 100% Acrylic Solution Dyed Fabric, 260 gr/m'2 - ArGun 260 - Ariteks
product_page.spec_line: 260 g/m², 100% Acrylic, All wheather resistant solution dyed outdoor fabric
description_blocks: ArGun 260 is %100 acrylic solution dyed fabric for awnings, marine application, outdoor furnishing, sun umbrella, automotive and sun blinds applications. The fabric is resistant to all wheather conditions and its world's most sun resistant fabric.
It is antibacterial and water repellent.

260 g/m² , 100% Acrylic, All wheather resistant solution dyed outdoor fabric.

ArGun 260 is %100 acrylic solution dyed fabric for awnings, marine application, outdoor furnishing, sun umbrella, automotive and sun blinds applications. The fabric is resistant to all wheather conditions and its world's most sun resistant fabric. It is antibacterial and water repellent.
